name: Jelly Shift Shape Control
description: Slide, squeeze, and flow in Jelly Shift Shape Control! Guide your lovable jelly through 200+ obstacle courses filled with twists, barriers, and runners. Shift up and down like an F1 driver to dodge crashes and collect diamonds to unlock cute jelly characters, colorful heroes, and jelly legends. Enjoy fast-moving gameplay, glorious colors, fun music, and satisfyingly squelchy sounds. Adapt, bounce back, and feel the thrill of jelly fever as you conquer unique levels. Hours of flexible, flowing fun await—be like jelly and keep sliding!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
